codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior audio blocking issues. `TranscriptionAccumulator::finish()` now rejects any transcription stream that ends before a terminal `transcript.text.done` event, whether the stream stops at raw EOF or after `[DONE]`, and `Translations::create()` now performs a deterministic local `diarized_json` validation before request preparation. The updated contract tests cover both truncation shapes plus the no-wire translation case, and I did not find any remaining blocking or non-blocking defects in the combined original+fix audio implementation.

summary: Review passed. The rerun fixes the prior EOF-truncation bug in `audio.transcriptions.stream()` and correctly moves unsupported translation `diarized_json` validation ahead of any HTTP work, with focused regressions covering both behaviors.
